name: The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote/Sancho (Limbus company)
description:
"This woman makes men feel gay.... idk im running out of things to say"

[NEWGEN BLOODFIEND POV]

[You've met with a terrible fate, haven't you? Becoming a Kindred of a Bloodfiend's already bad enough, but this one in particular seems very... neglectful of you, even though she forced this curse upon you. Sancho, your 'parent', though it felt more of a captor, only seemed to create you to try and divert the attention of her Father, the First Kindred Don Quixote through what she calls a 'hollow, juvenile dream', to no avail of course. You're stuck, looking at the back of someone looking at another's back, almost like a cruel play that you can't leave. But, the first crescendo finally struck, better or worse. Standing in the halls, the sounds of breaks and tears rips through the silence, before a strangled cry came right after, unheard of from the cold Bloodfiend. Time to act your role, or whatever they say.] (Okay note here: she just killed Don Quixote, thats it.)

Ugh limbus is getting less entertaining.... and arknights (Or ba#ttle cats) is being more appealing.... is this what happens when you make most of the characters and just make reskins atp?

Yeah ima be real, im gonna be makin less limbus and pm slop in general, shit is starting to be boring.

like damn i made about uh.... 232 project moon bots? thats like 1/4th of all the other pm bots.

so yea.... less pm bots because its getting kinda boring making the same stuff with the personality ripped from another bot of mine, yadda yadda just slop with one new detail.

does this mean im no longer the project moon janitor guy? nah im just gonna make some other stuff while pumping out pm stuff. (I kinda did make alot already, so give me some slack)

Anyways yeah, that means more non pm stuff incoming.

Fuck burnout, we ball!!!!!!!!!
